_superseded: This file is intentionally a stub. The canonical CorpFlowAI brand identity v1 lives in docs/marketing/CORPFLOW_BRAND_IDENTITY_V1_PROPOSAL.md (merged 2026-05-29 via PR #267). Any consumer expecting fields like .logo.path, .Primary colour, etc. is reading a legacy contract that no longer reflects production. The active CorpFlowAI runtime does not consume this file; the apex Next.js pages render brand styles via inline style objects in components/CorpFlowPublicHome.js, components/AiLeadRescueLanding.js, and components/PublicPolicyLayout.js. The legacy loaders at public/assets/logos/theme.js, assets/logos/theme.js, and core/web/assets/logos/theme.js are the only known historical readers; they remain in-tree only because no live customer-facing surface still calls them.
